query: SELECT id, name, category, isOrderable FROM ingredients WHERE category LIKE '%spez%' OR category LIKE '%Spez%' OR name LIKE '%pepe%' OR name LIKE '%paprica%' OR name LIKE '%cumino%' OR name LIKE '%cannella%' OR name LIKE '%curcuma%' ORDER BY name;
